title: canarium oblongifolium
intro: Canarium oblongifolium is a species of tree in the family Burseraceae, native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia, with its bark and resin being used for various medicinal purposes. The resin of the Canarium oblongifolium tree has been used traditionally in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Canarium oblongifolium include reducing inflammation, fighting against bacteria and fungi, and alleviating pain and discomfort. Canarium oblongifolium is often prepared as an herbal remedy through various methods, including infusion, decoction, and tincture, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
